IdempotencyKey.description: Optional client-supplied key (max 255 chars). Replaying the same key within 24 hours returns the original job rather than creating a duplicate. Strongly recommended for any non-idempotent network: cron jobs, browser retries, mobile clients.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

ErrorResponse.description: Generic error envelope returned for most failure cases.

GenerateImageRequest.description: Discriminated by `model`. Each model gates a specific `<model>Params` block (Midjourney, Flux, Seedream, Ideogram, Imagen, DALL-E, GPT Image, Kling Image, Qwen, Wan, Grok, Reve, Nano Banana, Flux LoRA).

GenerateMusicRequest.description: Discriminated by `model`. Covers Suno, Udio, Producer, Lyria 3 (clip + pro), and ElevenLabs Music.

GenerateVideoRequest.description: Discriminated by `model`. Covers Kling 2.1-3.0, Veo 2/3, Sora 2, Seedance 1-2, Hailuo, Luma, Wan 2.5-2.7, Runway Gen4, Midjourney Video, Grok Imagine Video.

ImageBackgroundRemoveRequest.description: Background removal via Bria RMBG 2.0 or 851-labs.

ImageEditRequest.description: Inpaint or outpaint via Flux Fill Pro.

ImageUpscaleRequest.description: Image upscale via Topaz (per-megapixel) or Clarity (flat).

InsufficientCredits.description: Team does not have enough credits to run this job. The numbers are in the API’s smallest credit unit.

expired.description: `true` once a COMPLETED job's CDN assets have been purged (default 24h retention). `result` URLs may 404.

JobAccepted.description: Returned by every successful job submission.

status.description: Status at the moment the job record was persisted. Almost always `QUEUED`; idempotent replays may return the original status.

JobList.description: Paginated list of jobs scoped to the caller (or to the whole team for admins).

Lora.description: A user-trained Flux LoRA — the persistent artifact behind the AI Photos feature.

LoraCreated.description: Returned by `POST /v2/loras` once the upload has been spooled and training queued.

Me.description: Authenticated caller — user, team and (when API-key auth is used) the key making the request.

ModelCatalogEntry.description: Curated, creator-facing model entry. Schema is intentionally loose — extra fields are allowed.

Upload.description: Short-lived CDN-hosted upload. The URL drops straight into any `start_image` / `image` / `video` field in the generation schemas.

ValidationError.description: Returned by every job-creating route when the request body fails Zod validation.

details.description: Per-field validation errors keyed by JSON path.

VideoEditRequest.description: Instruction-based video editing via Wan 2.7 VideoEdit.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key created in the Apiframe dashboard. Format: `afk_...`. Pass on every request as the `X-API-Key` header.
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

BearerAuth.description: Supabase JWT for first-party dashboard requests. SDK consumers should use `ApiKeyAuth` instead.

info.description: Unified HTTP API for AI image, video and music generation across 60+ models. Submit a job, poll `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` (or wait for a webhook), and consume the result. See the official Node.js SDK at https://www.npmjs.com/package/@apiframe-ai/sdk.
info.title: Apiframe API

post.description: Some video providers (Kie / Seedance) require assets to be pre-registered before they can be used as inputs. This endpoint forwards the URL to the provider and stores the returned asset ID so it can be reused across multiple jobs.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

post.summary: Register an asset with the upstream provider

get.description: Returns the provider's asset object verbatim (opaque, provider-specific shape). Only assets registered by the caller's team are accessible.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

404.description: Asset not found, or owned by a different team.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

post.description: Two tiers behind the `model` discriminator: `bria-bg-remove` (state-of-the-art alpha matting, commercially licensed) and `851-bg-remove` (sub-cent fast path). Both return a transparent PNG.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

post.description: Today wired to BFL Flux Fill Pro. `mode: "inpaint"` requires a `mask`; `mode: "outpaint"` requires an `outpaint` preset. Pricing is flat regardless of mode.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

post.summary: Submit an inpaint or outpaint job

post.description: Creates an image generation job. The `model` discriminator selects the family (Midjourney, Flux, Seedream, Ideogram, Imagen, DALL-E, GPT Image, Kling Image, Qwen, Wan, Grok, Reve, Nano Banana, Flux LoRA) and unlocks the matching `<model>Params` block.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

post.description: Creates an upscale job. Topaz is priced by output megapixels; Clarity is flat. The route probes the input image to compute pricing — failures return 400 before any credits are deducted.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

get.description: Paginated list of generation jobs. Defaults to the caller's own jobs; admins can pass `scope=team` to see every job in the team. Cursor pagination keyed on `(createdAt desc, id desc)`.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

get.description: Returns the current status, progress, and (when complete) the result for a single job. SDK consumers typically wrap this in a polling loop — see `client.jobs.waitFor()`.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

404.description: Job not found, or owned by a different user.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

get.description: Paginated listing of LoRAs scoped to the caller's team. Archived LoRAs are hidden by default.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

post.description: Multipart-form request with 15-30 training images plus metadata fields. Deducts 2 credits up-front (refunded on any subsequent failure) and queues a training job. The returned `id` becomes the `loraId` you pass to `flux-lora` inference.

images.description: 15-30 training images (JPEG / PNG / WebP, max 10 MB each, 100 MB total).

400.description: Validation failed (bad metadata, unsupported file, or wrong number of images).

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit hit OR per-team in-flight training cap reached.

post.summary: Create and train a Flux LoRA

delete.description: Soft-delete (status flipped to `ARCHIVED`). Best-effort cleanup of the upstream destination model on the trainer. Idempotent — deleting an already-archived LoRA also returns 204.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

404.description: LoRA not found, or owned by a different team.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

404.description: LoRA not found, or owned by a different team.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

get.description: Returns the user, their team (with credit balance + plan) and — when authenticated via API key — the key making the request. Useful for verifying credentials and rendering "logged-in as" headers.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

get.description: Public, no auth required. Returns the curated, creator-facing model catalog (id, label, description, control surface and cost range). Filter by `modality=image|video|music`.

post.description: Creates a music job across Suno, Udio, Producer, Lyria 3 and ElevenLabs Music. Suno and Udio always return TWO songs per call — the result is an array.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

post.description: Single-file multipart upload (max 25 MB image / audio, 50 MB video). Magic-byte sniffed — declared content-type is ignored. Returns a CDN URL drop-in for any image / video / audio input field. Files live ~1-2h before the cleanup worker reaps them.

file.description: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, MP4, WebM, MOV, MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A.

400.description: No file, oversize, or unsupported file type.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

post.summary: Upload a file to short-lived CDN storage

post.description: Today wired to Wan 2.7 VideoEdit. Per-second pricing — `duration` is required, otherwise the route probes the input video and bills its length.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

post.summary: Submit an instruction-based video edit job

post.description: Creates a video job. The `model` discriminator selects the family (Kling 2.1-3.0, Veo 2/3, Sora 2, Seedance 1-2, Hailuo, Luma, Wan 2.5-2.7, Runway Gen4, Midjourney Video, Grok Imagine Video) and unlocks the matching `<model>Params` block. Pricing for many video models is per-second; the route layer computes the multiplier from the requested `duration`.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.

post.description: Today wired to Topaz Video. Variant key encodes resolution + fps (`1080p_30`, etc.); the route probes the input video duration via ffprobe to compute the per-second multiplier.

202.description: Job accepted and queued. Track via `GET /v2/jobs/{id}` or webhook.

402.description: Team has insufficient credits to run this model.

403.description: Authenticated but the API key is inactive or lacks permission.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` seconds.

503.description: Service temporarily unavailable (queue / DB outage). Retry with backoff.
